steps.title: Focus on difference
steps.content: The task asks for a difference between the two flags. The relevant notes say Eritrea’s flag includes an olive branch, a plant, while Croatia’s flag includes leopards, animals.

steps.title: Contrast the symbols
steps.content: Choice A gives a general fact about flags and vexillology. Choice B says both countries use symbols but does not emphasize the contrast. Choice C only mentions flag study. The option with “whereas” directly contrasts plant and animal symbols. The answer is D.
